creator: kaltheat@gmail.com
text:
In a clean FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p19 i386 jail I can't install seafile from latest pkg repo:
...
Checking integrity... done (2 conflicting)
Cannot solve problem using SAT solver, trying another plan
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
Conflicts with the existing packages have been found.
One more solver iteration is needed to resolve them.
...

First pkg tells me that it wants to install "seafile: 5.1.3", but after downloading and failing integrity check (see above), it only wants to install 27 packages from 35 before integr. check, seafile not included ...
